tool.name: sheets_write_cell
tool.description: Write a value to a specific cell in a Google Spreadsheet. Uses the Name Box to navigate to the cell and then types the value into it.

parameters.name: cell
parameters.description: Target cell reference in A1 notation (e.g. 'A1', 'B5', 'C12')

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to write into the cell
